sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67734" key="mikromege/qhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-μεγέθης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n67734.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small in size</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:95" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.95</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.33</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
